text:
Created attachment 190270
patch to update the port

- Update 1.24 --> 1.26
Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/PHRED/SOAP-Lite-1.26/Changes
- "portlint -AC" gives unrelevant warns.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180129 at 11.1-release-amd64 with perl 5.24.3 runs ok.
- "make test" for this port (as run from within the same poudriere's jail) says: "PASS".
